hooks.prompt:
DOMAIN: documentation-guidelines
IF task involves: writing docs, README, API reference, technical specs, handoff notes, or bilingual documents
THEN: Read ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/SKILL.md for doc engineering standards.
RULE: BLUF (Bottom Line Up Front). Lead with the answer, not the reasoning.
FORMAT: Dual-version formal docs (EN + CN). Authorship: Joysusy & Violet Klaudia.

VERIFY: If documentation was produced, does it follow BLUF principle and include authorship header?
IF_NO: Add header and restructure lead paragraph.
